summary: Execution Transparency & Separated Analytics fully verified. All 20 backend tests passed. New endpoints working: /api/execution/rejection-report (returns rejection categories and breakdown), /api/execution/pipeline-stages (returns pipeline stage counts), /api/analytics/by-strategy (returns separated day_trading, long_term, manual_external analytics). Day trading round trips show actual P&L from Alpaca fills (TSM +$262.40, CRUS +$301.05, CF -$65.10). Manual position RNR appears in manual_external section as PROTECTED. Frontend Long-Term page shows 1250 companies with Market tab as default.

backend_tests.auth_login: PASS - Login with code Bullishalmarkhan7.7 returns token
backend_tests.rejection_report_structure: PASS - Returns total_candidates, executed, rejected, execution_rate, rejection_breakdown, rejection_categories
backend_tests.rejection_categories_defined: PASS - 18 rejection categories defined (timing_block, session_phase, confidence_below_threshold, etc.)
backend_tests.pipeline_stages_structure: PASS - Returns stages dict with candidate, executed, risk_check, approved, etc.
backend_tests.by_strategy_three_sections: PASS - Returns day_trading, long_term, manual_external sections
backend_tests.day_trading_fields: PASS - Has total_trades, closed_trades, win_rate, total_pnl, average_win_pct, average_loss_pct, best_trade, worst_trade, round_trips, open_positions
backend_tests.round_trips_structure: PASS - Shows actual P&L per trade (TSM +$262.40, CRUS +$301.05, CF -$65.10)
backend_tests.long_term_fields: PASS - Has active_positions (4), closed_positions (8), total_value, positions list
backend_tests.manual_external_section: PASS - Has position_count, positions, total_value, PROTECTED note
backend_tests.manual_positions_rnr: PASS - RNR found in manual_external as PROTECTED (qty=20, value=$6141.60)
backend_tests.market_overview_fields: PASS - Companies have symbol, name, rating_score, rating_label

frontend_tests.long_term_page_load: PASS - /long-term page loads with Long-Term Portfolio header
frontend_tests.market_tab_default: PASS - Market tab is default with 1250 companies
frontend_tests.category_filters: PASS - All (1250), Watch (633), Hot (233), Bullish (183), Overpriced (87), Undervalued (65), Momentum (24), Bearish (20), Breakout (5)
frontend_tests.company_cards: PASS - Shows CRUS (90), TSM (88.8), CF (88), JHG (87), INCY (86.8), EXEL (86.2) sorted by rating
frontend_tests.bucket_bars: PASS - Core (underweight), Quality Growth (overweight), Opportunistic Value (healthy)
frontend_tests.auto_trade_page: PASS - Shows scheduler RUNNING, PAPER mode, pipeline summary
frontend_tests.portfolio_analytics: PASS - Shows Total Equity $100,495.84, Win Rate 66.7%, P&L breakdown

features_verified: /api/execution/rejection-report returns rejection report with total_candidates, executed, rejected, execution_rate, rejection_breakdown, rejection_categories
/api/execution/pipeline-stages returns pipeline stage counts (candidate, timing_blocked, risk_check, approved, submitted, executed, rejected_by_risk, not_reached)
/api/analytics/by-strategy returns separated analytics with day_trading, long_term, and manual_external sections

Day trading analytics includes: total_trades (3), closed_trades (3), win_rate (66.7%), total_pnl ($498.35), average_win_pct (6.13%), average_loss_pct (-1.58%), best_trade, worst_trade, round_trips, open_positions
Round trips show actual P&L per trade from Alpaca fills (TSM +$262.40, CRUS +$301.05, CF -$65.10)
Manual/external positions section shows RNR as PROTECTED with note
Long-term section shows active_positions (4) and closed_positions (8) separately
Frontend /long-term page loads with Market tab showing 1250 companies sorted by rating
critical_code_review_comments: ExecutionTransparencyTracker correctly logs candidate journeys with rejection categories
By-strategy analytics correctly separates Day Trading (from Alpaca fills), Long-Term (from lt_portfolio), and Manual (positions not owned by bot)
Round trips calculation correctly matches buy/sell fills per symbol to compute actual P&L
Manual positions correctly identified by excluding bot-owned and LT-held positions
Rejection report will populate during next market session when scheduler runs
All 18 rejection categories properly defined with human-readable descriptions
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - used existing Alpaca fills and positions
context_for_next_testing_agent: Execution Transparency & Separated Analytics (P3) fully verified. /api/execution/rejection-report returns 0 entries for today since market is closed and tracker was just installed - will populate during next market session. /api/analytics/by-strategy correctly separates Day Trading (3 round trips: TSM +$262.40, CRUS +$301.05, CF -$65.10), Long-Term (4 active positions), and Manual (RNR PROTECTED). Previous iteration 37 tested Long-Term Market Overview with 1250 companies. The rejection report structure is correct with 18 rejection categories defined.
